description_long: This is a modern, curved office desk with a sleek, metallic frame and a smooth, light-colored work surface. The desk features a set of three drawers on the right side and a cabinet on the left, providing ample storage space. Integrated into the desktop is a raised monitor shelf and a built-in lamp with an adjustable arm, suggesting a focus on task lighting and ergonomic design. The surface includes cable management holes and cutouts, ideal for organizing electronic devices and accessories. The overall construction appears sturdy, with a combination of metal and engineered wood or laminate materials. The design is both functional and contemporary, suitable for professional or high-tech environments.
description: A modern, curved office desk with storage drawers, a cabinet, a raised monitor shelf, and an integrated adjustable lamp. The desk features cable management cutouts and a sleek, metallic frame.
description_view_0: Front view showing the curved desktop, left-side cabinet, right-side drawers, and the raised monitor shelf with the attached lamp.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the desk, the lamp's arm, and the cable management cutouts on the surface.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the three stacked drawers on the right and the open leg space beneath the desk.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the back of the drawers and the overall width of the desk.
attribute_orientation: The user-facing side is the curved edge with the drawers on the right and the cabinet on the left, featuring a raised monitor shelf and lamp at the back of the work surface.
attribute_usage_context: computer workstation or executive office desk
